seoTitle: Palm Beach vs Palm Cove — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Palm Beach and Palm Cove. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Palm Beach vs Palm Cove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Palm Beach and Palm Cove.
heading: Palm Beach vs Palm Cove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Palm Beach, Queensland and Palm Cove, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Palm Cove has a lower overall climate risk score (22/100) compared to Palm Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Palm Beach or Palm Cove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Palm Beach has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Palm Cove scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Palm Beach scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Palm Cove scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Palm Beach or Palm Cove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Palm Cove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
